value: I completely understand your frustration—being unable to create playlists under your artist name is definitely a limitation we should address. Unfortunately, I don't have an update on a timeline for this feature yet, but I'd like to help move this forward. Could you share your artist name and account email so I can flag this directly with our product team and make sure they have your specific use case documented? In the meantime, if there's a workaround that might help (like using a curator account), I'm happy to explore that with you.
